findings.description: `WebView_GenericAttributesTag` is missing from s3 hints. This is the RST anchor name used throughout all individual tag sections to reference this common attribute set (e.g., `:ref:`WebView_GenericAttributesTag``).
findings.source_evidence: Source defines `.. _WebView_GenericAttributesTag:` and all individual tag tables reference it by this name.

findings.description: `WebView_FocusAttributesTag` is missing from s4 hints. This is the RST anchor name used throughout all applicable individual tag sections to reference this focus attribute set.
findings.source_evidence: Source defines `.. _WebView_FocusAttributesTag:` and multiple tag tables reference it by this name.

findings.description: `value` is missing from s9 (radioButtonタグ) hints. It is a required attribute (`value(必須)`) in the radioButtonタグ attribute table.
findings.source_evidence: Source radioButtonタグ table lists `value(必須) | XHTMLのvalue属性。` as a required attribute.
